zh.Chérisy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯謝艾利希
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Cherisy於1331年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯謝艾利希時，她的父親Jean de Chérisy51歲，母親Péronne de Clermont41歲。她於1350年與seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Cherisy was born in 1331, in Chérisy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Jean de Chérisy, was 51 and her mother, Péronne de Clermont, was 41. She married seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye in 1350. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Cherisy est née en 1331, à Chérisy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jean de Chérisy, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Péronne de Clermont, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye en 1350. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Cherisy 1331 in Chérisy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Chérisy 51 und ihre Mutter Péronne de Clermont 41. Sie hat 1350 seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Cherisy è nata il nel 1331 nel Chérisy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Jean de Chérisy, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Péronne de Clermont, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye nel 1350. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.Chérisy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスチeリシ
ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Cherisyが1331年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスチeリシで生まれた時，父Jean de Chérisyは51歳，母Péronne de Clermontは41歳であった。1350年にseigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Royeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Cherisy(이)가 1331년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 che리시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Chérisy(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Péronne de Clermont(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1350년 seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Cherisy nasceu em 1331, em Chérisy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean de Chérisy, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Péronne de Clermont, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye em 1350. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Cherisy родилась в 1331 г. в местности чeриси, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean de Chérisy было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Péronne de Clermont, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye в 1350 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Cherisy nació en 1331, en Chérisy, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean de Chérisy, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Péronne de Clermont, tenía 41 años. Se casó con seigneur Mathieu IV le Flamand du Plessier de Roye en 1350. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas.
